name: Marionette Checkpoint
description: Manipulate four coupled strings and sustain a jointed puppet's hands and feet inside four sequential inspection poses.
natural_language: Pull the four strings until every limb remains inside the moving inspection rings for all four poses.

metadata.notes: New Interaction VII–VIII candidate. The browser renders the generated physical state and records only ordinary pointer/keyboard control events; the live server and exported verifier independently replay the mechanic-specific geometry or dynamics.
